title: Angel One (SmartAPI) WebSocket adapter — full implementation
acceptance_criteria: FIRST: verify Bun-compat spike — add a comment at top of angelone.ts documenting the outcome of importing the SmartAPI WebSocket package under Bun. Document any compatibility shim required.
package.json adds dependency: smartapi-javascript-sdk (or the current SmartAPI official npm package — verify the correct package name from the Angel One SmartAPI docs at the time of implementation)
src/ingestion/brokers/angelone.ts exports class AngelOneBrokerFeed implements BrokerFeed

Constructor takes { apiKey: string, clientCode: string, clientPin: string, totpSecret: string } — reads from ANGEL_API_KEY, ANGEL_CLIENT_CODE, ANGEL_CLIENT_PIN, ANGEL_TOTP_SECRET env vars if not provided. TOTP generated using a standard TOTP library (add otplib or similar dependency).

connect(): authenticates via SmartAPI REST login (POST to Angel One auth endpoint with apiKey + clientCode + clientPin + totp); stores the jwtToken and feedToken; initialises SmartAPI WebSocket (SmartAPIWebSocket or equivalent class) using feedToken; connects

subscribe(symbols): Angel One uses token-based subscriptions (not symbol strings); implement symbol-to-token mapping for NIFTY index + ATM CE/PE + INDIAVIX. Document in a comment that the token mapping may need updating as expiry changes weekly.

Tick mapping: Angel One WebSocket frames use a different format than Fyers — map incoming frame fields to BrokerTick (ltp, bid/ask if available, volume, oi, symbol, underlying, isIndex, optionType, strike)

CRITICAL — same disconnect classification as T-09: AUTH_FAILURE (token expired/invalid → log actionable message, do NOT retry) vs TRANSIENT (network → reconnect indefinitely with capped exponential backoff + jitter)
On AUTH_FAILURE: log ERROR: 'Angel One auth failure — check ANGEL_API_KEY, ANGEL_CLIENT_CODE, ANGEL_CLIENT_PIN, ANGEL_TOTP_SECRET. TOTP may have expired.'
Credentials (apiKey, clientCode, clientPin, jwtToken, feedToken) NEVER logged, even at DEBUG level — log only first 4 chars + '...' if needed
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
